steps.title: Identify the Decisive Pivot
steps.content: The passage begins by contextualizing D&V's research within a broader scholarly field, then shifts with “But” to highlight their unique contribution: they assembled the earliest fiscal records for any sovereign state, demonstrating that Philip's defaults resulted from short-term cash shortages rather than long-term unsustainable debt.

steps.title: Match the Focus to the Correct Answer
steps.content: Choice C correctly identifies the main idea: D&V advanced the field of state finance research by assembling novel evidence that gave them insight into Philip's defaults. The other three choices either narrow the focus, add unsupported details, or minimize the significance of their breakthrough. That matches choice C — C is correct.
